segments.caption: The video opens with a vibrant montage of school supplies on shelves at Target, with text overlays reading 'school supplies shopping @ target' and 'travel & giveaway,' accompanied by upbeat music. The scene transitions to a young woman, Kylin, sitting in the driver’s seat of a car, wearing a white t-shirt with a 'White' logo and long dark hair. She greets the audience, explaining that she’s heading to Target for back-to-school shopping, driven by viewer demand, and announces a giveaway for one lucky winner. She gestures expressively while speaking, then the video cuts to an exterior shot of the Target store, followed by her entering the store. Inside, she walks through the brightly lit aisles, passing colorful displays of school supplies, and speaks directly to the camera, mentioning her intention to buy items like gel pens and highlighters. The camera pans across shelves filled with pens, markers, and other stationery, including brands like Sharpie and Pilot, as she continues her shopping journey.

discovered_new_entities.Kylin: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white t-shirt with a 'White' logo, sitting in a car and later walking through Target, speaking directly to the camera with expressive hand gestures.
discovered_new_entities.Target Store: A brightly lit retail environment with colorful school supply displays, including shelves stocked with pens, markers, and other stationery, featuring prominent signage like 'SCHOOL' and brand names such as Sharpie and Pilot.
discovered_new_entities.School Supplies: Various stationery items including gel pens, highlighters, markers, and notebooks, displayed on shelves with price tags and brand labels like 'Sharpie S NOTE' and 'Pilot Fineliner'.

segments.caption: The video follows Kylin as she browses the school supply section of Target Store, focusing on stationery items. She begins by examining a variety of highlighters, including Sharpie S NOTE and Zebra Mildliner sets, expressing interest in their colors and considering them for purchase. She then picks up a set of Yoobi color-changing markers, noting their charitable aspect ('YOU BUY, YOOBI GIVES'), and adds them to her red shopping basket. Moving on, she explores notebooks, particularly Five Star brand, selecting a green one with dividers and a plain white one, commenting on their utility and size. She also picks up a simple, solid-colored wide-ruled notebook, appreciating its minimal design. Finally, she searches for a planner, expressing a need for one, and examines a small pink 'Student Planning Calendar' with a floral design, though she notes she doesn't love the color. Throughout, the shelves are brightly lit and organized with orange dividers, displaying price tags and brand labels like 'Sharpie' and 'Pilot'. Her hand, adorned with a silver ring, is frequently visible as she handles the items, and on-screen text provides her thoughts in both English and Chinese.

segments.caption: Kylin, a young woman with long dark hair wearing a white t-shirt with a 'White Fox' logo, is actively browsing school supplies in the brightly lit Target Store. She begins by examining a pink 'Organized' planner, expressing her preference for its color scheme and academic layout, while also noting her fondness for Five Star brand items. She then moves to the pen section, where she picks up a pack of Sharpie Clear View highlighters, commenting on their suitability for a giveaway. She continues to select various stationery items, including a colorful set of Paper Mate gel pens, black gel pens, and Post-it notes, placing them into her red shopping basket with circular perforations. She also grabs a pack of BIC mechanical pencils and a set of Yoobi markers, adding them to her basket. As she moves along, she highlights the variety of options available, such as different pen colors and brands like Pilot and Uniball, and expresses her intention to get more items for a giveaway. The shelves are stocked with vibrant school supplies, including folders, markers, and pens, with visible price tags and brand labels like 'Sharpie S NOTE' and 'Pilot Fineliner'. The environment remains consistent with bright lighting and organized displays, emphasizing the colorful and abundant selection of school supplies.

segments.caption: The video begins with Kylin browsing through a display of colorful file folders in the Target Store, selecting a white folder with a floral design and a pink one with a geometric pattern, both priced at $2.39. She comments on their cuteness and decides to take one of each, placing them into her Red Shopping Basket. The camera then pans to a wall of backpacks, where Kylin, holding her basket, turns to the camera with an expressive look, seemingly excited about her finds. She continues her shopping journey, moving to a section of binders, where she examines several 3-inch heavy-duty binders by Avery, available in gray, purple, and other colors, priced at $11.39. She picks up a gray binder, inspects it, and places it in her basket. The camera then sweeps across the shelves, showing a variety of school supplies including notebooks and folders, before panning to an empty pegboard wall with only a few remaining items, indicating the store is running low on stock. Throughout, Kylin’s white t-shirt with the 'White Fox' logo is visible, and the Target Store’s bright lighting and organized displays remain consistent, with signage like 'all in motion' and 'only at Target' visible in the background.

segments.caption: The video opens with a close-up of shelves stocked with school supplies, including file folders and binders in pastel and neutral tones, with price tags visible. The camera then pans to reveal Kylin, a young woman with long dark hair wearing a white t-shirt with a 'White Fox' logo, as she browses the aisles of Target Store. She picks up a purple 'Reinforced Quad Ruled' notebook, examining it closely before placing it into her red shopping basket, which features circular perforations. As she moves through the brightly lit store, she gestures expressively while speaking to the camera, occasionally glancing around at the colorful displays of school supplies, including orange bins filled with notebooks and folders. The environment is vibrant, with signage like 'college ruled notebooks' and 'all in motion' visible. At one point, she holds up the red shopping basket, making a peace sign, while text on screen reads 'gets so awkward filming in public,' indicating her self-awareness. She continues to navigate the aisle, passing shelves with water bottles and other stationery, maintaining an engaged and animated demeanor throughout.

segments.caption: The video opens with Kylin, a young woman with long dark hair wearing a white 'White Fox' t-shirt, walking through the brightly lit aisles of Target Store, engaging directly with the camera. She gestures expressively as she browses colorful school supplies, including shelves stocked with vibrant water bottles and backpacks. The camera follows her as she picks up a purple 'SIMPLE MODERN' water bottle, then pans across shelves displaying various backpacks and lunch bags, including a Hello Kitty design. She then moves to a display of school supplies, selecting a green-packaged Ticonderoga pencil pack and placing it into her red shopping basket, which already contains a purple notebook. She continues to browse, picking up a pack of ruled index cards before placing them in the basket. The camera briefly focuses on her holding a black smartphone, then cuts to a close-up of her hand placing a gray binder into the basket. The scene ends with Kylin holding up the red shopping basket, making a peace sign, as the on-screen text 'gets so awkward filming in public' appears briefly. The environment remains consistent with bright overhead lighting and organized displays, emphasizing the retail atmosphere of Target Store.

segments.caption: The video begins with Kylin, a young woman with long dark hair wearing a white t-shirt with a 'White Fox' logo, at a checkout counter in Target. She places a red shopping basket on the counter and begins scanning items, including a pack of Ticonderoga pencils and a purple notebook, which she then places into a red Target shopping bag with black polka dots. The scene transitions to Kylin sitting in the driver’s seat of a car, holding the red shopping bag and speaking to the camera, gesturing with her hands as she talks. She then drives to a Staples store, shown in an exterior shot with its red and white signage. Inside Staples, Kylin walks through an aisle filled with colorful 3-inch binders and file folders, examining them closely while holding her black smartphone. The camera pans across shelves displaying binders in various colors—gray, red, yellow, green, blue, and purple—each labeled with '1½ inch' and '100 sheet' specifications. Kylin continues to browse, her hand reaching out to touch a gray binder, indicating her selection process. The environment shifts from the bright, colorful Target store to the more utilitarian, red-and-white Staples, with consistent lighting and organized shelving. Her movements are deliberate and focused, reflecting her intent to gather school supplies.

segments.caption: The video opens with a close-up of a metal display rack filled with colorful planners and calendars, showcasing various designs including floral patterns and solid colors, with price tags clearly visible. A hand reaches in to pick up a planner with a blue floral cover, then flips through its pages, revealing a clean, organized layout. The camera pans across the shelf, highlighting different planner designs, including one with a vibrant orange cover and another with a citrus fruit motif. The scene transitions to a different section of the store, where the same hand selects a small, pastel-colored container labeled 'twellly' from a shelf stocked with travel-sized health and wellness products, including bandages, pain relievers, and hydration supplements. The hand then picks up a box of 'Mighty Patch' acne treatment strips, followed by a pack of colorful sticky notes. The camera briefly focuses on a promotional sign reading 'BUY 3, GET 1 FREE' before shifting to a wider shot of a young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white t-shirt with a 'White Fox' logo, standing in an aisle with red metal shelving. She speaks directly to the camera, gesturing with her hands as she talks, with shelves of office supplies visible behind her. The lighting is bright and even, typical of a retail environment, and the overall atmosphere is calm and organized.

segments.caption: The video begins with Kylin, a young woman with long dark hair wearing a white t-shirt with a 'White Fox' logo, filming herself in a Staples store. She browses through office supplies, picking up a yellow pack of sticky notes and examining it before placing it in her red shopping basket. She then moves to a display of colorful 3-ring binders, selecting a light blue Staples 3-Ring View Binder and holding it up to the camera. Next, she inspects a package of Martha Stewart large paper clips, showing them to the camera before moving on. The scene transitions to a home setting where Kylin sits in front of a potted plant, holding up a red Target shopping bag with white polka dots and the Target logo. She speaks directly to the camera, gesturing expressively with her hands, and the on-screen text '@kyla.malloy' appears in the top right corner. The lighting is soft and natural, contrasting with the bright fluorescent lighting of the store. Her demeanor is casual and engaging as she shares her shopping experience.

segments.caption: The video transitions to a home setting where Kylin, a young woman with long dark hair wearing a white t-shirt with a 'White Fox' logo, sits in front of a gray wall with a large potted plant in a woven basket to her left. She speaks directly to the camera, using expressive hand gestures to emphasize her points. On-screen text appears, listing calls to action: '-subscribe', '-follow my insta', '-comment'. She then holds up a white package of Martha Stewart Large Paper Clips, followed by a Staples 3-Ring View Binder in light blue and a gray 3-ring binder, showing both to the camera. Next, she displays a red Target Shopping Bag, pulling out two patterned notebooks—one with a green geometric design and another with a floral motif—holding them up for comparison. She then shows a white spiral notebook with a green label, followed by a mint green spiral notebook, each briefly displayed before being set aside. The lighting is soft and natural, creating a calm and inviting atmosphere, and the focus remains on Kylin’s interaction with the school supplies she has collected.

segments.caption: Kylin, a young woman with long dark hair wearing a white t-shirt with a 'White Fox' logo, is seated in a softly lit home setting with a gray wall and a large potted plant in a woven basket behind her. She speaks directly to the camera, showcasing various school supplies with expressive hand gestures. She begins by holding up a white Five Star spiral notebook, flipping it to show both the front and back covers, which feature branding and product details like 'Fights ink bleed' and '1 Subject'. She then presents a pink spiral-bound '2025/26 Student Planning Calendar' with a 'Planner' label and a 'Pencil' icon. Next, she displays a cardboard-packaged set of six colorful gel pens, followed by a Paper Mate InkJoy gel pen set with 10 vibrant colors in a clear plastic blister pack. She then holds up a Paper Mate Clear Point #2 pencil set with 10 colored pencils, also in a blister pack, and gestures toward the packaging while speaking. Throughout, her nails are neatly manicured with a light pink polish, and she wears a delicate silver ring on her right hand. The environment remains consistent with warm, natural lighting and a calm, organized atmosphere, suggesting a personal vlog-style review or unboxing of school supplies.

segments.caption: The video segment features Kylin, a young woman with long dark hair wearing a white t-shirt with a 'White Fox' logo, seated in a home setting with a gray wall and a large potted plant behind her. She begins by holding up a package of Zebra Mildliner Creative Markers, showcasing the 15-color set with chisel and bullet tips. She then transitions to displaying two packs of Post-it sticky notes in pastel pink and yellow, followed by a pack of Sharpie highlighters in vibrant colors. Next, she presents a set of Sharpie paint markers in bold neon shades, including yellow, pink, and orange. She then holds up a Five Star notebook, flipping it to show both the front and back covers, which feature product details like 'Fights ink bleed' and '1 Subject'. After placing the notebook down, she claps her hands together and speaks directly to the camera with expressive gestures. The segment concludes with a transition to an end screen featuring a thumbnail of a previous video titled 'COLLEGE DORM SHOPPING!! back to school shopping at Target', a circular profile picture of Kylin by the water, and the text 'subscribe new videos every week' in a cursive font.

entity_library.Sticky Notes: Colorful packs of sticky notes in pastel shades, held and examined by Kylin before being placed into her red shopping basket.
entity_library.Staples 3-Ring View Binder: A light blue 3-ring view binder with a clear front cover, labeled 'Staples 3-Ring View Binder Heavy Duty', held up by Kylin for display.
entity_library.Martha Stewart Large Paper Clips: A white carded package containing three large gold paper clips, labeled 'Martha Stewart Large Paper Clips', held by Kylin and shown to the camera.
entity_library.Target Shopping Bag: A red reusable shopping bag with white polka dots and the Target logo, held by Kylin in a home setting as she speaks to the camera.
entity_library.Home Setting: A softly lit indoor environment with a gray wall, wooden floor, and a large potted plant in a woven basket, where Kylin sits and speaks to the camera while displaying school supplies.
entity_library.Five Star Notebook: A white spiral-bound notebook with 'Five Star' branding, featuring product details like 'Fights ink bleed' and '1 Subject' on the back cover, held and flipped by Kylin to show both sides.
entity_library.2025/26 Student Planning Calendar: A pink spiral-bound planner labeled '2025/26 Student Planning Calendar' with a 'Planner' title and a 'Pencil' icon, held up by Kylin to display its front cover.
entity_library.Gel Pens (6-pack): A cardboard-packaged set of six colorful gel pens in pastel shades, held by Kylin and shown to the camera.
entity_library.Paper Mate InkJoy Gel Pen Set: A blister-packaged set of 10 colorful Paper Mate InkJoy gel pens in a rainbow gradient, held by Kylin and displayed prominently.
entity_library.Paper Mate Clear Point Pencil Set: A blister-packaged set of 10 colored Paper Mate Clear Point #2 pencils, held by Kylin and shown to the camera with visible branding and product details.
entity_library.Zebra Mildliner Creative Markers: A 15-color set of markers in a white and blue package, featuring chisel and bullet tips, held up by Kylin to display the full range of pastel and bright colors.
entity_library.Post-it Sticky Notes: Two packs of sticky notes in pastel pink and yellow, held side-by-side by Kylin to show their compact size and color options.
entity_library.Sharpie Highlighters: A pack of four Sharpie highlighters in bright pink, orange, yellow, and blue, displayed in a clear plastic blister pack with the Sharpie logo and 'No Bleed' icon.
entity_library.Sharpie Paint Markers: A pack of three Sharpie paint markers in neon yellow, pink, and orange, shown in a purple and white sunburst-patterned blister pack with the Sharpie logo and 'Paint' label.
entity_library.End Screen: A gradient background with a video thumbnail on the left, a circular profile picture on the right, and cursive text 'subscribe new videos every week' in the center, serving as a call-to-action for viewers.
